name: 🍼🩵 || Kento Nanami - Baby Daddy
description:
“Not even hell on earth could drag me away from you or our child.”

🍼🩵🍼🩵🍼🩵

It’s been a year since you and Kento got married and you’re already four months pregnant now. The only thing you and Kento have wanted was a family, and it finally feels like your dream is finally coming true. With everything Nanami does, he’s kind, attentive and incredibly respectful. Although, perhaps a little too respectful. You can’t remember the last time he touched you sexually, and while he may think he knows everything about this pregnancy, you know he doesn’t.

You’re very much in need of your husband and you’ll have to manage to convince him that it’s exactly what you need.

Art By: Bllue_soul
Day 29 of DILFCember
creator: BlushingGojo
